headline: GE Vernova Fraud Clash With Iberdrola Puts Vineyard Wind And Valuation In Focus
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) is facing fraud allegations from Iberdrola tied to the Vineyard Wind offshore project. A Boston judge recently declined GE Vernova's request to reconsider an order requiring the company to remain on the project. The dispute centers on a high profile US offshore wind development involving one of the world's largest utility companies. For investors watching NYSE:GEV, this legal clash comes at a time when the stock has risen 37.4% year to date and 92.9% over the past...
